text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In a sudden turn of events,<n>Umamusume from
around the world<n>will be arriving for an
impromptu<n>cultural exchange festival.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I'm hurriedly preparing for the<n>occasion, when...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
One, two, three... That should be<n>enough flags.
Place the campus map<n>directly by the entrance,
and make<n>sure it is readily visible to the crowds!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The welcome gate is the face of the<n>school! I
expect all of your work to be<n>carried out with
pride.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Air Groove has such a dignified air to<n>her...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
She's always so calm and collected,<n>her
instructions always so clear and<n>precise... She
amazes me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You there! Who said there wasn't<n>work to be
done? I want you both to<n>take care of putting up
some extra<n>balloons.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Cultural exchange fosters the perfect<n>
environment to learn about each<n>other's best
qualities—as well as how<n>to improve on them.
Keep that in mind.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Understood!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: There you are, Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What's the matter, Scarlet? Did you<n>run all the
way here?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, there's something I need to<n>urgently
discuss with you. Um... Rats,<n>it's on the tip of my
tongue!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right! I wanted to ask about<n>the
trophies for the special exhibit—the<n>one set to be
held on the pathway to<n>the field.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That has already been discussed by<n>the student
council. Simply follow the<n>list and arrange the
designated<n>trophies.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Okay, but the flower arrangements<n>we ordered
for the guest's seating<n>area also won't be
delivered in time!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That won't pose an issue. I've been<n>growing
moth orchids at a nearby<n>greenhouse ahead of
time.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
They should be just about ready.<n>Arrange for
you and some others to<n>bring a few pots over.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much! I'll get to that<n>right now!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Just one moment, Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Y-yes?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove stops Daiwa Scarlet in her<n>tracks. She
begins to comb through<n>her hair with her fingers.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Your hair is all disheveled. That won't<n>do.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I presume you've been cajoled into<n>taking all
sorts of jobs, big or small.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Don't push yourself too hard. I'll join<n>you later
to lend a hand.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much! That means a lot<n>to me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove's kind consideration<n>appears to calm
Daiwa Scarlet down.
